title: Hexo+Butterfly搭建教程
content: 准备1个vercel账号，1个github账号，Vscode,Git部署Hexo1.新建一个文件夹，右键打开Git Bash,输入npm install hexo-cli -ghexo init [blogroot]cd [blogroot]npm install hexo-deployer-git --savenpm install hexo-renderer-pug hexo-renderer-stylus --save
